title: selaginella expansa
intro: Selaginella expansa, also known as the Indian spikenard, is a type of ancient, spore-bearing vascular plant native to tropical Asia. Traditionally, this plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Selaginella expansa include its potential to reduce stress, improve cognitive function, and alleviate symptoms of anxiety and insomnia. Herbal preparations of Selaginella expansa can be found in teas, tinctures, and capsules, which are often used to support overall well-being and promote relaxation.
